members.name: Munich Pharmacies
members.description: Pharmacy locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass. Styled green and available from the catalog as a primary lead-discovery layer.

members.name: Munich Offices — All
members.description: All office-related locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass, including office=* and building=office features. Styled neutral gray and disabled by default because it is a large context layer.

members.name: Munich Law Firms
members.description: Law firm office locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled deep purple for legal-service lead discovery.

members.name: Munich Consultants
members.description: Consulting office locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled teal for advisory and professional-services leads.

members.name: Munich Real Estate Offices
members.description: Real estate office locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled burnt orange for property, listings, and brokerage workflows.

members.name: Munich Insurance Offices
members.description: Insurance office locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled civic blue for claims, forms, and customer-service workflows.

members.name: Munich Government Offices
members.description: Government office locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled near-black to distinguish public-sector offices from private businesses.

members.name: Munich Company Offices
members.description: Company office locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled green to highlight general business-development targets.

members.name: Munich Generic Office Buildings
members.description: Generic office building locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled slate gray as building-level context rather than individual named prospects.

members.name: Munich Other Offices
members.description: Other office-related locations split from the Munich Offices layer. Styled light gray for lower-specificity office records that still may be useful for research.

members.name: Munich Clinics
members.description: Clinic, doctor, and dentist locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass. Styled blue for health-service lead discovery and disabled by default to keep the startup map readable.

members.name: Munich Coworking Spaces
members.description: Coworking and startup workspace locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass. Styled purple for founder-network, partnership, and event leads.

members.name: Munich Restaurants
members.description: Restaurant, cafe, fast-food, bar, pub, and food-court locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass. Styled orange for local-marketing, reviews, reservations, and inventory leads.

catalog.name: Real Estate Intelligence
catalog.description: Official Munich/Bavaria market, legal-planning, residential-quality, restriction, building, and demand-driver context for real-estate research. Official WMS layers are raw factual data. Reference entries document official sources that are not exposed here as stable no-key map layers. Investor scoring is derived analysis, not an official city rating.

members.name: Market & Land Value
members.description: Official market and land-value context. These layers are useful for investment overview, but exact property value still requires further valuation and official documents.

members.name: Bodenrichtwerte Bayern / Munich 2026 (Official WMS)
members.description: Bodenrichtwerte are official land-value zones, but exact property value requires further valuation. Raw factual official land-value-zone visualization from the Bavaria VBORIS / GDI Bayern WMS. Source: Landesamt fuer Digitalisierung, Breitband und Vermessung / GDI Bayern, WMS, official state land-value data.

members.name: Reference / Gutachterausschuss München Lagekarte
members.description: Official Gutachterausschuss / Munich market-reference source. Added as a reference because a stable no-key WMS/GeoJSON Lagekarte endpoint was not confirmed. Use it alongside Bodenrichtwerte and official market reports before making investment decisions.

members.name: Legal Planning
members.description: Official Munich Bebauungsplan WMS layers. Bebauungsplaene are more legally specific than the FNP and should be checked before investment or development decisions.

members.name: Munich Bebauungspläne in Kraft (Official WMS)
members.description: Bebauungsplaene are more legally specific and should be checked before investment or development decisions. Raw factual visualization of legally binding Munich Bebauungsplan areas from the official Munich GeoPortal WMS.

members.name: Munich Bebauungspläne in Aufstellung (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich WMS layer for Bebauungsplaene in preparation. This is legal-planning context and should be checked together with plan documents before investment or development decisions.

members.name: Residential Quality
members.description: Official residential rent/location-quality references. These help understand residential rent and location quality, not purchase price.

members.name: Reference / Mietspiegel 2025 Wohnlagenkarte
members.description: This helps understand residential rent/location quality, not purchase price. Added as a reference because a stable no-key WMS/GeoJSON Wohnlagenkarte endpoint was not confirmed for embedding.

members.name: Strategic Land Use
members.description: Strategic citywide land-use context. The Flachennutzungsplan is useful for long-term context, but not exact parcel-level permission.

members.name: Munich Flächennutzungsplan / FNP (Strategic Land Use)
members.description: The Flächennutzungsplan is a strategic citywide land-use plan. It is useful for long-term context, but not exact parcel-level permission. Raw factual planning visualization from the official Munich GeoPortal WMS.

members.name: Restrictions & Risk
members.description: Official Munich restrictions and risk-context layers. These identify possible constraints for deeper research but do not replace legal or technical due diligence.

members.name: Munich Erhaltungssatzungen / Preservation Areas (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich WMS layer for areas with Erhaltungssatzung / preservation statutes. This is a strong restriction flag for derived investor scoring and must be verified in the official statute documents.

members.name: Munich Flood / Water Constraint Areas (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich planning WMS context for flood / water constraint areas from STEP 2024 climate adaptation layers. Raw factual/context data; verify exact regulatory effect with official documents.

members.name: Munich Landscape Protection Areas (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich WMS landscape-protection polygons. Raw factual/environmental constraint data from the city GeoPortal.

members.name: Munich Nature Protection Areas (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich WMS nature-protection areas. Raw factual/environmental constraint data from the city GeoPortal.

members.name: Munich Noise Mitigation Planning 2024 (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich WMS planning context for noise mitigation planning. Raw factual/context layer; verify specific constraints with official documents.

members.name: Buildings & Parcels
members.description: Official/open building and parcel-adjacent references. Large Bavaria products are kept as footprints or reference entries unless they are practical to stream in-browser.

members.name: Bavaria LoD2 3D Buildings - Munich Footprint (Official OpenData)
members.description: Official Bavaria OpenData LoD2 building-model download footprint for Munich. This is a practical footprint and metadata layer, not an in-browser 3D Tiles stream or parcel model.

members.name: Reference / Bavaria Hausumringe
members.description: Official/open Bavaria building-footprint product. Added as a reference because the statewide product is download-oriented and was not confirmed as a practical stable no-key WMS/GeoJSON stream for this cockpit.

members.name: Reference / ALKIS Tatsächliche Nutzung
members.description: Official cadastral actual-use reference path. Not embedded as a map layer here because a practical stable no-key Munich/Bavaria WMS/GeoJSON endpoint was not confirmed. Do not treat this cockpit as parcel ownership or cadastral proof.

members.name: Demand Drivers
members.description: Existing City Intelligence Cockpit OSM-derived business layers reused as demand-driver context for derived investor scoring. These are open/community data, not official planning data.

members.name: Demand Driver - Munich Offices
members.description: OSM-derived office locations reused as demand-driver context for derived investor scoring. Source: OpenStreetMap / Overpass, GeoJSON, open/community data.

members.name: Demand Driver - Munich Restaurants
members.description: OSM-derived restaurant and food-service locations reused as demand-driver context for derived investor scoring. Source: OpenStreetMap / Overpass, GeoJSON, open/community data.

members.name: Demand Driver - Munich Clinics
members.description: OSM-derived clinics, doctors, and dentists reused as service demand-driver context for derived investor scoring. Source: OpenStreetMap / Overpass, GeoJSON, open/community data.

members.name: Demand Driver - Munich Pharmacies
members.description: OSM-derived pharmacies reused as service demand-driver context for derived investor scoring. Source: OpenStreetMap / Overpass, GeoJSON, open/community data.

members.name: Demand Driver - Munich Coworking Spaces
members.description: OSM-derived coworking and startup workspace locations reused as business-activity demand-driver context for derived investor scoring. Source: OpenStreetMap / Overpass, GeoJSON, open/community data.

members.name: Demand Driver - Munich Rail Transit Context (Official WMS)
members.description: Official Munich STEP 2024 public-transport / rail-stop context layer. Used as optional demand-driver context; current scoring treats transit as a manual observation rather than inferring exact accessibility from WMS pixels.

catalog.name: Munich Public Datasets
catalog.description: Verified no-key Munich public and open geodata layers from the official Munich Open Data and GeoPortal services. Civic layers use blue-gray, teal, and green styling where Terria supports it, and all layers are disabled by default.

members.name: Boundaries & Administration
members.description: Official Munich administrative geography, styled with restrained civic boundary colors.

members.name: Munich City Districts (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich city district polygons from the GeoPortal WFS. Disabled by default.

members.name: Transport & Mobility
members.description: Official Munich transport, traffic, curb, charging, and shared-mobility datasets, styled with blue and teal map symbols where point styling is supported.

members.name: Munich Traffic Signals (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich Open Data WFS GeoJSON layer for traffic signals (Lichtsignalanlagen). Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Construction Sites - Next 4 Weeks (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official temporary construction restrictions for walking, driving, and parking in Munich. This layer is larger and is disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Disabled Parking (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official disabled parking locations in Munich. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich EV Charging Locations (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official public-ground charging infrastructure locations in Munich. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Mobility Points (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich mobility-point locations. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Carsharing Parking (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official general carsharing parking areas in Munich. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Signed Cycling Network (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official signed cycling network from the Munich cycling city map. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Old Town Cycling Ring (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Altstadt-Radlring line data. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Bike-Sharing Parking Areas (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official parking areas for bike sharing. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich E-Scooter Parking Areas (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official parking areas for e-scooters. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich E-Moped Parking Areas (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official parking areas for e-mopeds. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Cargo-Bike Sharing Parking Areas (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official parking areas for cargo-bike sharing. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich E-Scooter Geofences (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official shared-mobility geofence polygons. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Digital 3L Zones (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official digital 3L curb/loading-zone line layer. Disabled by default.

members.name: Environment & Green Space
members.description: Official Munich environment-related public layers currently verified for this cockpit, styled with green and blue civic colors for quick visual separation from business leads.

members.name: Munich Drinking Fountains (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official municipal drinking fountains. Also listed under Infrastructure & Utilities for convenience. Disabled by default.

members.name: Infrastructure & Utilities
members.description: Official Munich utility and city infrastructure datasets, styled with blue-green utility colors where point styling is supported.

members.name: Munich Drinking Fountains (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich Open Data WFS GeoJSON layer for municipal drinking fountains. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich EV Charging Pillars (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official public-ground charging pillars in Munich. Disabled by default.

catalog.name: Germany Public Datasets
catalog.description: Verified no-key Germany-wide public map layers from official BKG services. These layers use restrained blue-gray civic styling and are disabled by default.

members.name: Basemaps
members.description: Official Germany basemap layers from basemap.de/BKG, useful as manually enabled civic context layers.

members.name: Germany basemap.de Web Raster Color (Official WMS)
members.description: Official basemap.de color raster WMS for Germany from BKG. Disabled by default.

members.name: Germany basemap.de Web Raster Gray (Official WMS)
members.description: Official basemap.de gray raster WMS for Germany from BKG. Disabled by default.

members.name: Administrative Boundaries
members.description: Official BKG VG250 administrative boundary WMS layers, useful for regional context and disabled by default.

members.name: Germany Federal States - VG250 (Official WMS)
members.description: Official BKG VG250 federal-state boundaries. Disabled by default.

members.name: Germany Districts - VG250 (Official WMS)
members.description: Official BKG VG250 district boundaries. Disabled by default.

members.name: Germany Municipalities - VG250 (Official WMS)
members.description: Official BKG VG250 municipality boundaries. This can be visually dense, so it is disabled by default.

members.name: Germany Administrative Boundary Lines - VG250 (Official WMS)
members.description: Official BKG VG250 administrative boundary lines. Disabled by default.

catalog.name: Europe Public Datasets
catalog.description: Verified no-key Europe-wide public geodata from Eurostat/GISCO and Copernicus/EEA services, plus research-only references for licensed company-sector datasets. Large context layers remain disabled by default.

members.name: Administrative / Statistical Boundaries
members.description: Official EU statistical geography layers from Eurostat/GISCO, styled with blue-gray boundary fills for continental context.

members.name: Europe Countries 2024 (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO country boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 0 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 0 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 1 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 1 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 2 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 2 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 3 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 3 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default. This can be heavier than level 0-2 and is not enabled at startup.

members.name: Environment
members.description: Europe-wide environmental public layers from Copernicus/EEA, intended for optional regional context.

members.name: Corine Land Cover 2018 Raster (Copernicus/EEA WMS)
members.description: Copernicus Land Monitoring Service / EEA Corine Land Cover 2018 raster WMS. Disabled by default.

members.name: Corine Land Cover 2018 Vector (Copernicus/EEA WMS)
members.description: Copernicus Land Monitoring Service / EEA Corine Land Cover 2018 vector WMS. Disabled by default.

members.name: Company / GICS Sector Data Sources
members.description: Research-only references for a future Europe-wide company dataset by GICS sector. A complete current company-level GICS dataset is a licensed market-data product, so these entries document approved source paths and an import template instead of exposing an empty or broken map layer.

members.name: Europe GICS Company Data Source References
members.description: Local reference-anchor layer for source paths toward a future Europe-wide company dataset by GICS sector. These are not company locations; they document official/licensed source paths, open identity data, identifier matching, and the local import template.

members.name: Reference / GICS Official Standard and Licensing
members.description: Official S&P Dow Jones Indices / MSCI Global Industry Classification Standard reference. Use this to confirm sector definitions and licensing before importing company-level GICS classifications.

members.name: Reference / GLEIF LEI Company Identity Data
members.description: Open legal-entity identity data with names, identifiers, and registered addresses. GLEIF is useful for company identity matching but does not provide authoritative GICS sectors.

metadataUrls.title: GLEIF LEI Data Access and Use

members.name: Reference / OpenFIGI Identifier Mapping
members.description: Free identifier-mapping API that can help reconcile securities to market identifiers. It is not a complete Europe company/GICS dataset and high-volume use may require an API key.

members.name: Reference / Europe GICS Company Import Template
members.description: Local import template for a future licensed or user-provided Europe company dataset with latitude, longitude, GICS sector, company identifiers, and provenance fields.

catalog.name: Visual Reference Layers
catalog.description: Optional no-key visual context layers and Munich 3D dataset footprints. These use simple technical styling, are disabled by default, and do not re-enable token-dependent terrain, external feeds, or API keys.

members.name: Basemaps & Visual References
members.description: Optional public visual layers that can be manually enabled for context. These are visual references, not lead sources.

members.name: Satellite View (Optional Visual Layer)
members.description: Optional no-key Sentinel-2 cloudless satellite imagery by EOX. Satellite View is also available in Map Settings as a selectable basemap.
members.attribution: Sentinel-2 cloudless by EOX. Contains modified Copernicus Sentinel data 2025. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

members.name: Germany basemap.de Context (Optional WMS)
members.description: Optional official basemap.de WMS context layer for Germany. Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich 3D Dataset Footprints
members.description: Munich-only official 3D dataset footprints from Bavaria OpenData. These neutral technical layers show download coverage and metadata for real 3D source datasets without loading multi-gigabyte CityGML, SLPK, GeoTIFF, or LAZ files in the browser.

members.name: Munich LoD2 3D Buildings (Official CityGML Footprint)
members.description: Official Bavaria OpenData LoD2 building-model download footprint for Munich. Styled neutral purple-gray as a technical coverage layer. The source is published as weekly CityGML downloads, so this catalogue item shows the Munich coverage and download metadata rather than pretending to stream a live 3D Tiles mesh.

members.name: Munich DGM1 Terrain Model (Official GeoTIFF Footprint)
members.description: Official Bavaria OpenData 1 m terrain-model download footprint for Munich. Styled neutral gray as a technical coverage layer. The source is distributed as GeoTIFF downloads and does not require a terrain token.

members.name: Munich DOM20 Surface Model (Official GeoTIFF Footprint)
members.description: Official Bavaria OpenData 20 cm surface-model download footprint for Munich, including terrain, buildings, and vegetation in raster surface-model form. Styled technical teal to separate surface-model coverage from building and terrain footprints.

members.name: Munich Laser Point Cloud (Official LAZ Footprint)
members.description: Official Bavaria OpenData laser point-cloud download footprint for Munich. Styled amber-brown as a technical point-cloud coverage layer. The source is distributed as LAZ downloads for offline 3D processing.

members.name: Munich DOM Mesh Project Areas (Official SLPK Footprints)
members.description: Official Bavaria OpenData textured surface mesh project areas that intersect Munich. Styled muted red as technical mesh coverage. The source is distributed as large SLPK downloads and is shown as project coverage metadata in Terria.
